items.headline: NBA History: John Havlicek’s steal seals Celtics’ Game 7 Win vs. PHI on April 15, 1965
items.description: John Havlicek seals the win for the Boston Celtics in Game 7 of the 1965 Eastern Conference Finals against Wilt Chamberlain and the Philadelphia 76ers by knocking away Hal Greer's inbounds pass in the final seconds!

items.headline: The Celtics and 76ers have quite the Game 7 history
items.description: Check out this mix highlighting the best moments from the BOS/PHI Series and the history between the two teams.

items.headline: Game Recap: Raptors 112, Cavaliers 110
items.description: The Raptors defeated the Cavaliers, 112-110, in overtime to force a Game 7 and tie the series at 3-3.
